retrieved_result: What does the saying \"every train needs a caboose\" mean? Yan Wenjuan Answered May 11, 2015A caboose is a manned North American rail transport vehiclecoupled at the end of a freight train. Cabooses provided shelter for crew at the end of a train, who were required for switching and shunting, and to keep a lookout for load shifting, damage to equipment and
